d: Granny Dahnie summons Parasitic Grass within 2 tiles for 3s. Every second, enemies within range cannot move or act and lose [[25]] Energy and at least [[60%]]<ATK> HP. The total amount of their lost HP is [[130%]]<ATK>. Granny Dahnie also recovers an equal amount of HP. She is [[unaffected]] while Parasitic Grass exists.
The total amount of enemies' lost HP is increased to [[140%]]<ATK> per second, and each enemy's minimum HP loss is increased to [[65%]]<ATK>.
The Energy loss per second of enemies in range is increased to [[35]].
The total amount of enemies' lost HP is increased to [[150%]]<ATK> per second, and each enemy's minimum HP loss is increased to [[70%]]<ATK>.
The total amount of enemies' lost HP is increased to [[160%]]<ATK> per second, and each enemy's minimum HP loss is increased to [[75%]]<ATK>.

When an enemy deals total damage equal to [[15%]] of Granny Dahnie's max HP to her, Granny Dahnie shoots Parasitic Seeds at this enemy, dealing [[120%]]<ATK> damage and reducing their Haste by [[40]] for [[6]]s.
Reduces the enemy's Haste by [[50]].
Reduces the enemy's Haste by [[55]].
Reduces the enemy's Haste by [[60]].
Granny Dahnie [[taunts]] an enemy for [[3]]s and instantly recovers [[140%]]<ATK> HP. This skill prioritizes the enemy who targets the [[weakest]] ally.
Granny Dahnie recovers[[150%]]<ATK> HP.
Granny Dahnie recovers[[160%]]<ATK> HP.
Granny Dahnie recovers[[170%]]<ATK> HP.
Granny Dahnie increases her Vitality by [[11]] during battle. She gains an extra [[3]] Vitality while casting Threshold of Jade.
Granny Dahnie increases her Vitality by [[15]] during battle. She gains an extra [[4]] Vitality while casting Threshold of Jade.
Granny Dahnie increases her Vitality by [[19]] during battle. She gains an extra [[5]] Vitality while casting Threshold of Jade.

When Granny Dahnie's HP ratio is lower than [[50%]], the Glimmerbloom Shield grows bigger, increasing her Phys DEF by [[50%]] and Magic DEF by [[50%]] and recovering [[100%]]<ATK> HP every second. The skill lasts [[12]]s and can be cast once every battle.
Recovers [[105%]]<ATK> HP every second.
Gains [[unaffected]] when skill takes effect.
Recovers [[110%]]<ATK> HP every second.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Crit Resist, 15 Ranged DEF, 10 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Granny Dahnie recovers [[120%]]<ATK> HP when shooting seeds using Seed Cannon.

Shooting a Parasitic Seed instantly restores Granny Dahnie's Energy by [[100]]. While shooting the Parasitic Seed, Granny Dahnie's Haste increases by [[150]], and the ATK reduction the seed inflicts on enemies is further increased by [[70%]].
